title: Battle of the Reincarnated
description: A modpack that combines the Tensura Reincarnated mod with a bunch of other mods to create a fun experience.
body:
# Welcome to Battle of the Reincarnated

This modpack is based on the Tensura Reincarnated mod, and aims to combine the elements of other mods to keep a relatively true-to-the-anime type vibe. (Although, there are a few random things in here that don't match at all)

The Main mods of this pack are Tensura-Reincarnated, Minecolonies, Create, Ice and Fire, and Botania. Also, the End has been changed as well to make it a little more challenging to obtain.

This is a modpack designed for the viewers of the Bandit Helps - Gaming YouTube channel.


## Attributions:
The following mods require Attribution, so here they are.

Cosmetic Armor Reworked: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

End of Mending: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/end-of-mending](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/end-of-mending)
